name: codex-bridge
description: Inspect and test a live Roblox Studio session from Codex through CodexBridge MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and test Roblox Studio projects
interface.longDescription: Use Codex to inspect live Roblox Studio hierarchy, scripts, GUI trees, serialized instances, screenshots, and bounded playtest output through the CodexBridge Studio bridge.
defaultPrompt: Inspect StarterGui in my open Roblox Studio project
Read this Studio instance by CodexUniqueID
List children under this live Studio object
Run a Studio playtest and summarize runtime errors
